description_long: This is a weathered marble bust of a robed human figure, likely female, with long flowing hair and a serene, slightly tilted expression. The figure holds a set of scales in her right hand, symbolizing justice, with the chains and pans of the scales clearly visible. The sculpture is partially incomplete, with the lower torso and left arm missing or roughly hewn, giving it a fragmentary appearance. The surface shows signs of age, with greenish patina and discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. The drapery of the robe is intricately carved, with deep folds and a sense of movement. The back of the bust is less detailed, with rough, unfinished stone and visible tool marks.
description: A weathered marble bust of a robed figure holding scales, symbolizing justice, with detailed drapery and a partially incomplete form.
description_view_0: Front view showing the serene face, flowing hair, and the scales held in the right hand, with detailed drapery and visible patina.
description_view_1: Angled view from the right, highlighting the scales and the figure's tilted head, with more visible discoloration and the incomplete lower section.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the rough, unfinished stone and less detail, with the back of the head and robe visible.
description_view_3: Left side view focusing on the profile of the face, the draped robe, and the incomplete left side of the bust.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure holding scales, symbolizing justice
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
